_comment: Polygon bevel of a single cube face (top, +y): inset to 50% of original size + extrude 0.2 along face normal. Vibe3D's poly_bevel formula: new[i] = center + (orig[i] - center) * insert + normal * shift. The Blender side replicates this manually via inset topology + explicit vertex placement so the diff isolates poly_bevel logic.
